value.stringValue: Error while creating territory associations for provider

Error while updating territory alias on provider

decisions.description: To check the related HCPF record of practice to inactive the respective provider and practice

decisions.description: The decision to check the status field to move to inactive

recordLookups.description: Fetch the related provider record to the HCPF
recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Provider

recordUpdates.description: Update the related to inactive since there are no valid provider practice related to practice
recordUpdates.name: Update_Related_Practice
recordUpdates.label: Update Related Practice

recordUpdates.description: Update the related to inactive since there are no valid provider practice related to provider
recordUpdates.name: Update_Related_Provider

variables.description: Variable to store health care provider record
variables.name: HealthCareProvider

variables.description: Variable to store the collection size related to HCPF of practice
variables.name: practiceHCPFCollectionSize

variables.description: Variable to store the count of the related HCPF of provder
variables.name: ProviderHCPFCollectionSize

variables.description: This store all the related HCPF record related to Practice
variables.name: Related_HCPF_Practice

variables.description: Variable to store the HCPF related to the provider
variables.name: Related_HCPF_Provider
